economics.summary: Since the start of the Iran war, sharp moves for oil prices have triggered swings up and down for financial markets worldwide, sometimes by the hour.

economics.title: What could happen with mortgage interest rates this spring? Experts weigh in
economics.summary: Mortgage rates have fallen steadily, but could new developments change that trend this spring? Here's what to know.

economics.title: CPI Report Update: U.S. Inflation Remains Steady at 2.4% in February 2026 CPI Report, Core Rate Holds at 2.5%
economics.summary: U.S. inflation showed no acceleration in February, with the headline Consumer Price Index holding firm at 2.4% annually while monthly gains ticked slightly higher amid persistent shelter costs and a rebound in energy prices, the Labor Department reported Wedn…

economics.title: Inflation held steady last month before attack on Iran sent energy costs soaring
economics.summary: Wednesday's data has been overtaken by the conflict that began when the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran on Feb. 28, which has caused wild gyrations in oil prices as shipping lanes through the Persian Gulf have suffered a rare shutdown.
